content:
```Cargo.toml
[package]
name = "auto-git"
version = "1.0.0"
edition = "2024"

[dependencies]
notify = "8.2.0"
tokio = { version = "1.47.1", features = ["full"] }

```

- Add more info for publishing to crates.io
- Upon installed, the cli tool would be "ag"

```toml
[package]
name = "auto-git"
version = "1.0.0"
edition = "2024"
authors = ["Your Name <you@example.com>"]
description = "A CLI tool that automatically stages and commits file changes using a filesystem watcher"
documentation = "https://docs.rs/auto-git"
homepage = "https://github.com/you/auto-git"
repository = "https://github.com/you/auto-git"
readme = "README.md"
license = "MIT"
keywords = ["git", "automation", "watcher", "cli", "commit"]
categories = ["command-line-utilities", "development-tools"]
exclude = [".github/", "tests/", ".gitignore"]

[[bin]]
name = "ag"
path = "src/main.rs"

[dependencies]
notify = "8.2.0"
tokio = { version = "1.47.1", features = ["full"] }
```

Key additions explained:

| Field | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `authors` | Shows ownership on crates.io |
| `description` | **Required** for publishing — shown in search results |
| `documentation` | Links to docs.rs (auto-generated) |
| `homepage` / `repository` | Source links on crates.io |
| `readme` | Renders `README.md` on the crates.io page |
| `license` | **Required** for publishing |
| `keywords` | Up to 5 — improves discoverability |
| `categories` | Crates.io browse categories (must match [valid list](https://crates.io/category_slugs)) |
| `exclude` | Keeps the published crate lean |
| `[[bin]] name = "ag"` | Sets the installed binary name to `ag` |

> After publishing, users run `cargo install auto-git` and the binary available will be `ag`.
